name: discuss
description: Start discovery interview. Gather requirements, constraints, risks.

name: plan
description: Create SPEC + BLUEPRINT from REQUIREMENTS. Lock spec before execute.

name: execute
description: Begin wave-based implementation. Dispatches executor agents per wave.

name: audit
description: Dispatch verifier in fresh context against validation contract.

name: accept
description: Final acceptance gate. Requires user confirmation.

name: status
description: Show current workflow phase, wave progress, spec lock state.

name: amend
description: Propose a change to a locked spec via the amendment flow.

name: help
description: List all Spec Mode commands with descriptions.

name: pause
description: Save checkpoint and pause. Generates HANDOFF.md.

name: quick
description: Fast-track a small task. Runs full pipeline in lazy autopilot.

name: research
description: Dispatch researcher agent on a specific topic.

name: debug
description: Dispatch debugger with scientific debugging workflow.

name: map-codebase
description: Dispatch explorer to map codebase and build knowledge base.

name: pr-review
description: Review a GitHub PR end-to-end with fix options.

name: init
description: Generate or refresh the project AGENTS.md context file.
